# Debt Relief or Bankruptcy? - Compare Your Options [2026]
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> Should you try debt relief or file bankruptcy? Compare debt management, settlement, consolidation, and Chapter 7 or 13. 2026 decision guide.

## About
debtrelieforbankruptcy.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Bankruptcy Alternatives: 7 Options Before You File: https://debtrelieforbankruptcy.com/alternatives.html
- Chapter 13 as Structured Debt Relief: https://debtrelieforbankruptcy.com/chapter-13.html
- Chapter 7 Bankruptcy as Debt Relief: https://debtrelieforbankruptcy.com/chapter-7.html
- Bankruptcy vs Debt Relief - Compare All Options Side by Side: https://debtrelieforbankruptcy.com/compare-options.html
- Side-by-Side Comparison: All Debt Relief Options: https://debtrelieforbankruptcy.com/comparison-chart.html
- True Cost of Each Debt Relief Option: https://debtrelieforbankruptcy.com/cost-comparison.html
- Credit Counseling and Debt Management Plans: https://debtrelieforbankruptcy.com/credit-counseling.html
- Debt Consolidation: https://debtrelieforbankruptcy.com/debt-consolidation.html
- How to Get Debt Free Without Bankruptcy - All Options: https://debtrelieforbankruptcy.com/debt-free-without-bankruptcy.html
- Debt Settlement Pros and Cons - Compared to Bankruptcy: https://debtrelieforbankruptcy.com/debt-settlement-pros-cons.html
- Debt Settlement: How It Works: https://debtrelieforbankruptcy.com/debt-settlement.html
- Debt Snowball vs Avalanche Method - Which Payoff Strategy Works: https://debtrelieforbankruptcy.com/debt-snowball-vs-avalanche.html
- FAQ - Debt Relief vs Bankruptcy: https://debtrelieforbankruptcy.com/faq.html
- How to Write a Financial Hardship Letter - Templates and Guide: https://debtrelieforbankruptcy.com/financial-hardship-letter.html
- Debt Relief or Bankruptcy? - Compare Your Options: https://debtrelieforbankruptcy.com/
- Payday Loan Bankruptcy: Can You Discharge Payday Loans?: https://debtrelieforbankruptcy.com/payday-loans.html
- Privacy Policy: https://debtrelieforbankruptcy.com/privacy.html

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
